about.intro:
I am a 23-year-old BSc student from Oslo, Norway. 

My professional journey began at Elvebakken High School (Class of 2022), before continuing into the Royal Norwegian Air Force. I served as an OR1 before I was promoted to OR2 at the Wing Operations Centers in Bardufoss and Ørland. In the Air Force I developed a disciplined and structured approach to technical problem-solving under pressure, an approach I now try to apply to my BSc studies in Informatics: Data Technology.
about.story:
Beyond the classroom in Bergen, I am actively engaged in the student community. I serve as Treasurer/Finance Manager and Board Member of the ECHO Sports Club (ESC), where I am responsible for the economy and budgeting, in addition to leading our padel group. 

Furthermore, I am a board member of Hyggkom, where I help organize social activities that foster a healthy balance between demanding studies and a strong social environment within our faculty's reading rooms. 

I have always been interested in the technical aspects of the world, which have strongly influenced my choice of education. Recently, I have developed a particular interest in game development and graphics programming. I am currently working on a game project called

* in my spare time (available on my GitHub). 

During my time in the Air Force, I had the opportunity to fly both single-engine aircraft and helicopters. My long-term ambition is to turn this passion for aviation into reality by obtaining a Private Pilot License (PPL).

courses.name: INF102 – Algorithms, Data Structures and Programming

career.title: Deputy Specialist (OR2)
career.company: Royal Norwegian Air Force (Ørland Air Station)
career.description: Operations room specialist responsible for handling visiting flights and daily airport operations. Served as NCO for conscripts with responsibilities including room inspection and duty scheduling.

career.title: Conscript (OR1/OR1+)
career.description: Operations room management, handling visiting flights, logging, and slot allocation.

career.title: Kindergarten Substitute
career.description: Participation in play and activities, assisting during meals and dressing, contributing to a safe and structured daily routine.

career.title: All-Sports Instructor
career.description: Primary responsibility for groups of approximately 30 children (ages 3–5). Preparation and facilitation of various physical activities.
